subject: Fermi  trigger No 744761058: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:
V. Lipunov, V.Kornilov, E. Gorbovskoy, K. Zhirkov, N.Tyurina, P.Balanutsa, A.Kuznetsov, V.Senik,  D. Vlasenko,
G.Antipov, D.Zimnukhov, E.Minkina, A.Chasovnikov, V.Topolev, D.Kuvshinov, D. Cheryasov, Ya.Kechin, Yu.Tselik, A. Sosnovskij

V. Yurkov, A. Gabovich
(Blagoveschensk Educational State University)

MASTER-SAAO robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in South Africa (South African Astronomical Observatory) started inspect of the Fermi GRB240807.92 (trigger No 744761058,20h 17m 28.80s , -48d 16m 12.0s, R=9.87) errorbox  15438 sec after notice time and 15443 sec after trigger time at 2024-08-08 02:21:37 UT, with upper limit up to  19.1 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 50 deg. The sun  altitude  is -38.5 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = -34 deg., longitude l = 351 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=2554750

We obtain a following upper limits.
